recommendations.title: In the Loop
recommendations.overview: The US President and the UK Prime Minister are planning on launching a war in the Middle East, but—behind the scenes—government officials and advisers are either promoting the war or are trying to prevent it.

recommendations.title: Salting the Battlefield
recommendations.overview: David Hare concludes his trilogy of films about MI5 renegade Johnny Worricker with another fugue on power, secrets and the British establishment. Johnny Worricker goes on the run with Margot Tyrell across Europe, and with the net closing in, the form

recommendations.title: London Has Fallen
recommendations.overview: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning discovers a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

recommendations.title: Billionaire Boys Club
recommendations.overview: A group of wealthy boys in Los Angeles during the early 1980s establishes a get rich quick scam that turns deadly.

recommendations.title: Straight A's
recommendations.overview: Pressured by his late mother's ghost to return home to the family he abandoned, a former addict grabs a bag of pills and a sack of marijuana and hits the road to Shreveport.

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: A Dark Truth
recommendations.overview: In the jungles of Ecuador, blood taints the waters. A multinational conglomerate's unholy alliance with a bloodthirsty military regime has resulted in a massacre. Only the rebel Francisco Franco and his determined wife Mia can prove the truth. To set

recommendations.title: Shooter
recommendations.overview: A top Marine sniper, Bob Lee Swagger, leaves the military after a mission goes horribly awry and disappears, living in seclusion. He is coaxed back into service after a high-profile government official convinces him to help thwart a plot to kill the

recommendations.title: Norman: The Moderate Rise and Tragic Fall of a New York Fixer
recommendations.overview: A financial schemer finds himself in the middle of an international scandal after he becomes a political adviser to the new Prime Minister of Israel.

recommendations.title: Ali G Indahouse
